summary: Tested Teacher Delays Report feature. Backend APIs (GET /api/reports/teacher-delays and /api/reports/teacher-delays/export) work correctly returning valid JSON with teachers array and summary. Frontend navigation from Reports page and Side Menu to /report-teacher-delays works. UI shows correct elements: header, summary cards (0 معلم, 0 متأخرين, 0 حالة تأخر), department filter, and empty state message. Fixed a bug in server.py line 390-393 where None values for permissions caused TypeError.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: server.py line 390-393 - Changed 'user.get("permissions", [])' to 'user.get("permissions") or []' to handle None values that caused TypeError when building permission set
reports.tsx line 591-603 - Teacher delays card correctly added with data-testid='report-teacher-delays-btn' and proper permission check
SideMenu.tsx line 92-94 - Teacher delays menu item correctly added with REPORT_TEACHER_DELAYS permission
AuthContext.tsx line 57 - REPORT_TEACHER_DELAYS permission constant properly defined

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 tests passed, 1 skipped - dean user not in test env)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements verified via Playwright

seed_data_creation: None - no delay data exists yet, empty state displayed correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Teacher Delays feature fully verified. Backend APIs at /api/reports/teacher-delays and /api/reports/teacher-delays/export work correctly. Frontend page at /report-teacher-delays loads with all expected UI elements. Side menu navigation works. Export button visible for admin with export_reports permission. Bug fixed: server.py permissions handling for None values.

verified_features.backend_teacher_delays_api: PASSED - Returns valid JSON with teachers array and summary object
verified_features.backend_teacher_delays_export: PASSED - Returns xlsx file with correct content-type and content-disposition
verified_features.backend_permission_check: PASSED - Returns 403 for users without view_reports permission
verified_features.frontend_reports_page_card: PASSED - تأخر المعلمين card visible with alarm icon
verified_features.frontend_teacher_delays_page: PASSED - Shows header, summary cards, filter, empty state
verified_features.frontend_export_button: PASSED - Export button visible on teacher delays page header

bug_fixed.description: TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable when user.permissions is None
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed user.get('permissions', []) to user.get('permissions') or [] to handle explicit None values
bug_fixed.impact: Affected teacher login and any user without permissions array set
